    BuyingPower.Builder
    dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends DayTradeBuyingPowerAmount> dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
    The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request.
    BuyingPower.Builder
    isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(boolean isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
    The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.
    BuyingPower.Builder
    isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(Optional<Boolean> isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
    The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

  • Method Details

    • accountEquityAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder accountEquityAmount(AccountEquityAmount accountEquityAmount)

      The account_equity in USD returned from the request.

    • accountId

      The account ID returned from the request.

    • accountId

      public BuyingPower.Builder accountId(Optional<String> accountId)
      The account ID returned from the request.

    • buyingPowerAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder buyingPowerAmount(BuyingPowerAmount buyingPowerAmount)
      The buying_power of the account in USD returned from the request.

    • buyingPowerAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder buyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BuyingPowerAmount> buyingPowerAmount)
      The buying_power of the account in USD returned from the request.

    • dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(DayTradeBuyingPowerAmount dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
      The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request. If the is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean is true this will be set from day_trade_buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator, or else if it is false it will be set from buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator.

    • dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends DayTradeBuyingPowerAmount> dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
      The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request. If the is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean is true this will be set from day_trade_buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator, or else if it is false it will be set from buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator.

    • isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed

      public BuyingPower.Builder isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(boolean isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
      The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

    • isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed

      public BuyingPower.Builder isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(Optional<Boolean> isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
      The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

    • name

      public BuyingPower.Builder name(String name)
      The service generated name of the BuyingPower Format: accounts/{account_id}/buyingPower

    • name

      The service generated name of the BuyingPower Format: accounts/{account_id}/buyingPower

    • positionMarketValueAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder positionMarketValueAmount(PositionMarketValueAmount positionMarketValueAmount)
      The position_market_value in USD returned from the request.

    • positionMarketValueAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder positionMarketValueAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PositionMarketValueAmount> positionMarketValueAmount)
      The position_market_value in USD returned from the request.

    • requirements

      public BuyingPower.Builder requirements(Requirements requirements)
      Margin Requirements fields returned from the request.

    • requirements

      public BuyingPower.Builder requirements(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Requirements> requirements)
      Margin Requirements fields returned from the request.

    • smaAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder smaAmount(SmaAmount smaAmount)
      The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request. This will only be populated for margin accounts and is the margin equity minus the RegT requirements.

    • smaAmount

      public BuyingPower.Builder smaAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SmaAmount> smaAmount)
      The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request. This will only be populated for margin accounts and is the margin equity minus the RegT requirements.

    • build

      public BuyingPower build()
